name: SWAP Base Building Plan (12 weeks)
author: David Roche & Megan Roche, MD PhD
description: Bundled training plan imported from SWAP_Plans PDF templates.

sessions.pace_description: Rest
sessions.notes: Rest. Most sacred day of the week! Can be active, but no impact or stress

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy plus 6 x 30 sec hills fast
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy plus 6 x 30 sec hills fast. On easy running, think smooth and relaxed. During base period, on days you feel great, can progress pace a bit, but never force it.On hill strides, think powerful, easing into them and building up speed to emphasize max output development

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy. Nice and low level aerobic time Optional easy double or x-train.On doubles, think 20-40 min slow running to build up aerobic volume. X-train can be a key part of base building if you enjoy it. For athletes that ski, for example, the x-train can be the primary activity and the double can be a short run, a la Kilian Jornet

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy. On theseflat strides, you want to ease into the stimulus. Goal early in base is to build up speed so that aerobic building happens with optimal running economy. Optional easy double or x-train Note: any Thursday can be a pure x-train day, especially for athletes that are volume-limited

sessions.pace_description: 3-8 mi easy or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 3-8 mi easy or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 10-16 mi easy
sessions.notes: 10-16 mi easy. On this long run, fully activate the aerobic system, staying in Zone 1 or Zone 2. General goal is to get base-building long runs around 2-hour range or a bit longer

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills fast Optional easy
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills fast Optional easy double or x-train Note:any Sunday can be a pure x-train day, with long skis, bikes, or other activities perfect for aerobic building at lower running volume.

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 4-12 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 4-12 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy. Most Tuesdays in build will be about very easy running setting up for more steady running on Wednesday

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy warm-up, 8 x 90 sec hills mod/hard (think 5k)
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy warm-up, 8 x 90 sec hills mod/hard (think 5k) with run down recovery, 2 mi easy/mod to mod (think 50k effort to start, finishing with more effort), 1-2 mi slow. Want to establishpower at VO2 maxprior to aerobic focus Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 4-12 mi easy
sessions.notes: 4-12 mi easy. Keep this very relaxed after hills the day before Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 3-8 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 3-8 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 10-18 mieasy/mod
sessions.notes: 10-18 mieasy/mod. Start relaxed, and build into effort, with option to progress to 50k-style steady running in the 2nd half

sessions.pace_description: 6-14 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy in middle
sessions.notes: 6-14 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy in middle Optional easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy plus 5 x 30 sec hills fast
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy plus 5 x 30 sec hills fast

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy warm-up, 16 x 1 min fast/1 min easy (think 10k
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy warm-up, 16 x 1 min fast/1 min easy (think 10k effort to start, progressing to faster effort as you go, with the easy recoveries as “floats” where you go slightly above easy), 4 min easy, 4 x 30 sec hills fast, 2-3 mi easy. Quick speed rebuild to start plan, true aerobic building starts now! Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy Optional easy double or x-train
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 12-20 mi easy
sessions.notes: 12-20 mi easy. Full aerobic long run, keep it relaxed and aim to finish feeling good

sessions.pace_description: 8-15 mi easy
sessions.notes: 8-15 mi easy. Pure aerobic weekend Optional x-train

sessions.pace_description: Rest
sessions.notes: Rest. As you build up, can add light x-train on this day in base period

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy/mod to mod, ideally over hills
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy/mod to mod, ideally over hills. On this run, start very relaxed, and after 20-30 min, pick up the effort to Zone 2/3 in a 5-Zone model.Don’t go too hard! No double or x-train this week

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy No double or x-train
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy No double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 3-8 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 3-8 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 10-16 mi easy/mod (30 min in the middle around marathon
sessions.notes: 10-16 mi easy/mod (30 min in the middle around marathon effort with a bit of progression as you go). Keep the M-effort controlled and smooth, building aerobic power and efficiency

sessions.pace_description: 6-14 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills fast Optional easy
sessions.notes: 6-14 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills fast Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: Rest or easy x-train
sessions.notes: Rest or easy x-train. Make sure

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy/mod to mod
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy/mod to mod. Same deal as last week, just getting comfortable at steady

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills fast Optional easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills fast Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy/mod to mod
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy/mod to mod. This should really start feeling more comfortable now, with HR settling in without excessive HR

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 12-20 mi easy
sessions.notes: 12-20 mi easy. You can progress effort slightly in the 2nd half, especially on uphills, if you feel perfect.

sessions.pace_description: 8-16 mi easy
sessions.notes: 8-16 mi easy. Can progress effort slightly in 2nd half again, for a higher quality Sunday

sessions.pace_description: Rest or easy x-train
sessions.notes: Rest or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy with 6 x 20 seconds fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy with 6 x 20 seconds fast/2 min easy

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 4-6 x 5 min at half marathon effort with 2 min
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 4-6 x 5 min at half marathon effort with 2 min easy recovery, 4 x 30 sec hills fast, 2-3 mi easy. Key to avoid “burning” on these intervals, think Zone 3 to lower Zone 4 in 5-Zone model Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy Optional easy double or x-train
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 3-8 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 3-8 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 10-18 mi easy
sessions.notes: 10-18 mi easy. Nice and relaxed, ideally over hilly terrain for some mechanical stimulus!

sessions.pace_description: 8-14 mi easy with 6 x 30 seconds fast/2 min easy in middle
sessions.notes: 8-14 mi easy with 6 x 30 seconds fast/2 min easy in middle Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: Rest or easy x-train
sessions.notes: Rest or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 5 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 5 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy

sessions.pace_description: 2-4 mi easy, 15-20 x 1 min fast/1 min float, 2-4 mi easy
sessions.notes: 2-4 mi easy, 15-20 x 1 min fast/1 min float, 2-4 mi easy. Think 10k effort to start, with light progression as you go! Mini speed stimulus. Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy No double with tougher long run on tap on
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy No double with tougher long run on tap on Saturday

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 12-20 mi easy/mod
sessions.notes: 12-20 mi easy/mod. Start easy and settle in at 90-95% of M effort, just a smooth flow that clicks off the miles fast and works on aerobic metabolism

sessions.pace_description: 6-14 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills fast No double or x-train
sessions.notes: 6-14 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills fast No double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: Rest or easy x-train
sessions.notes: Rest or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy

sessions.pace_description: 6-13 miles easy/mod to mod
sessions.notes: 6-13 miles easy/mod to mod. Avoid the burning feeling! Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy Optional easy double or x-train
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 3-8 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 3-8 mi easy plus 6 x 20 sec hills or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 10-16 mi easy/mod (6 x 5 min at M effort or a bit harder
sessions.notes: 10-16 mi easy/mod (6 x 5 min at M effort or a bit harder with 5 min float recovery). Floats just above normal easy. Working on shuttling low levels of lactate at steady efforts

sessions.pace_description: 8-14 mi very easy
sessions.notes: 8-14 mi very easy. Will be a bit more tired from bigger effort on Sat Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: Rest or easy x-train
sessions.notes: Rest or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy Optional easy
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 8-14 mi very easy
sessions.notes: 8-14 mi very easy. Ideally mostly in Zone 1 or low Zone 2 Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy Optional easy
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 12-20 mi easy
sessions.notes: 12-20 mi easy. Keep this one very relaxed the whole time, pure aerobic base run

sessions.pace_description: 8-16 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy in middle
sessions.notes: 8-16 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy in middle Optional x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 4-8 x 3 min at 1-hour effort with with 3 min
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 4-8 x 3 min at 1-hour effort with with 3 min float recovery around 50k effort, 2-3 mi easy Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy Optional easy double or x-train
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 3-8 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy or easy x-train

sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy with 5 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy Optional easy double or x-train

sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 12-20 mi easy
sessions.notes: 12-20 mi easy. Pure aerobic base run!

sessions.pace_description: 8-16 mi easy
sessions.notes: 8-16 mi easy. Pure aerobic weekend No double or x-train

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 20 min mod/hard around 1-hour effort, 5 min
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 20 min mod/hard around 1-hour effort, 5 min easy, 5-10 x 1 min fast/1 min easy (think 10k, with light progression), 2-3 mi easy. Tempo/speed combo to end plan!

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy No double before tougher long run
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy No double before tougher long run

sessions.pace_description: 3-8 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy or easy x-train
sessions.notes: 3-8 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy or easy x-train

sessions.pace_description: 12-20 mi easy/mod
sessions.notes: 12-20 mi easy/mod. In the second half of the run, can progress effort into steady Zone 3. You should really see running economy benefits now

sessions.pace_description: 8-14 mi easy/mod
sessions.notes: 8-14 mi easy/mod. Can progress in the same way as Sat Optional easy x-train
